home.shopByCategorySub: Find exactly what you need to improve your game
home.trustShipInfo:
Orders over $99 ship free. We process orders within 1 business day, and tracking updates appear once your package leaves our warehouse.

Most items ship from our main fulfillment center for consistent delivery timing. During peak seasons, delivery may take a little longer, but your tracking will always show the latest status. If you don’t see tracking within 24 hours of your order confirmation, please check your email or contact support. We pack items carefully with protective materials to help them arrive in excellent condition. If you need to adjust delivery instructions after shipment, reach out to support and we’ll do our best.
home.trustPayInfo:
Pay securely with major cards. During checkout, your payment details are encrypted and protected.

We never store your full card number. You may also see additional security checks for certain purchases. Our checkout may include bank verification (such as 3D Secure) to help reduce fraud. If you need help, our support team can guide you through the process and help you complete checkout smoothly.
home.trustReturnsInfo:
Return unused items within 30 days. After inspection, refunds are issued back to your original payment method.

To keep things simple, please include the order details and return the item in its original condition and packaging when possible. We may ask you to confirm certain details to prevent delays. Once your return is received and approved, we’ll process the refund and send a confirmation email. Refunds are typically processed after we receive and inspect your return, and timing depends on your bank.
home.trustSupportInfo:
Need help picking the right gear? Our golf experts answer product questions and help you find the best fit.

Ask about drivers, irons, balls, bags, accessories, and order support anytime.
home.promoSpringSub: Save up to 40% on select clubs, bags, and accessories. Limited time offer for members.

about.heroTitle: Built for golfers who care about every shot
about.heroLead: We are a specialty golf retailer focused on authentic gear, fair pricing, and a shopping experience that respects your time—on the course and online.
about.storyTagline: From weekend rounds to tournament prep
about.storyP1: GreenLinks started with a simple idea: make it easier to find quality equipment without guessing through endless listings. We curate clubs, balls, bags, apparel, and accessories with the same attention golfers bring to their own games.
about.storyP2: Our team blends retail operations with product knowledge so we can answer real questions—shafts and lofts, ball compression, bag fits—and help you choose gear that matches how you play.
about.storyP3: Today we continue to invest in a fast storefront, transparent policies, and tools that help you shop with confidence—from AI-powered guidance to live chat when you want a human in the loop.
about.missionLead: We believe better gear lowers friction between you and your best swing. These principles guide how we build GreenLinks every day.
about.value1Body: We prioritize proven brands and gear that performs—so you spend less time filtering and more time playing.
about.value2Body: Clear pricing, sale rules, and product detail matter. We aim to show the story behind each item, not just the SKU.
about.value3Body: Questions happen. Our assistants and team are here for sizing help, order updates, and post-purchase support.
about.promiseTitle: What you can expect from us
about.promise1: Responsive support through chat and AI when you need quick answers.
about.promise2: Policies written in plain language—shipping, returns, and account tools you can actually use.
about.promise3: A storefront that works in light or dark mode and in multiple languages for global golfers.
about.promise4: Continuous improvement: we ship updates to make browsing, checkout, and account pages smoother.
about.ctaLead: Browse curated categories, explore current deals, or reach out from your account hub—we will meet you where you are.
